历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13818 → 14694 → 16997 → 19466 → 20928, shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 7110 places; the increase from 2024 to 2025 was about 1462 places, narrowing compared to the previous two years, but the backward trend remains unchanged; the 2025 baseline is about 20928 places; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province was 36 students from 2021 to 2022, increased to 38 in 2023, and 39 in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 39 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, and the plan factor has a neutral impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science China University Ranking 2026 approximately 70th, with rankings stable in the 64–70 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Literature; the university has established a working group to investigate, which has a certain impact on academic reputation; Douyin popularity ranking 81st (average), short video exposure moderately low; no obvious record of admission gaps; fifth round of discipline evaluation: Geology A, Archaeology A, Software Engineering A-; 3 A-/A/A+ disciplines, at the upper-middle level among 211 universities; Software Engineering A- is directly related to the Computer and Software Engineering majors in Physics Category enrollment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, creating positive application heat for Northwest University's Computer Science, Software Engineering, and other enrollment majors; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 143,600 (estimated based on historical proportions), basically unchanged from 2025, with the candidate size factor being neutral; the provincial control line for 2025 undergraduate batch is 367 points, down 1 point from 368 points in 2024, a very small change; Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a western 211 university, with an enrollment scale of 39 students in Liaoning, a relatively small proportion; Liaoning candidates generally have average regional preference for western universities, with no obvious positive or negative effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, stable candidate size, somewhat negative but not significantly impactful university reputation, and the positive pull of engineering major popularity on Computer Science and related majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 20928; predicted minimum ranking approximately 21178, with a range of 20678–21678.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
